name: Nagoa Beach
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A picture-perfect, crescent-shaped beach fringed with rare Hoka palm trees, famous for its golden sands, calm waters, and thrilling water sports.
history: The unique branching Hoka trees (Hyphaene dichotoma) found here were brought from Africa by the Portuguese centuries ago.
famousFor: Golden sands, water sports, and African Hoka trees.
